title: OniAi
altTitles: Oniichan dakedo Ai sae Areba Kankeinai yo ne!
description:
OniAi is a romantic comedy anime centered around Akito Himenokouji, a hardworking high school student whose peaceful life suddenly changes when his younger twin sister, Akiko, returns to live with him after years of separation.Although they were apart for a long time, Akiko has developed an extreme affection for her brother and constantly tries to get closer to him in humorous and awkward ways. Akito, however, only wants to live a normal school life and often struggles to handle his sister’s dramatic behavior.As the story continues, several unique girls enter Akito’s life, including intelligent student council members and eccentric classmates, creating endless comedic misunderstandings and chaotic moments. 

The anime is filled with over-the-top humor, slice-of-life moments, exaggerated reactions, and playful character interactions. Beneath the comedy, the series also explores themes of family bonds, friendship, and teenage emotions in a lighthearted and entertaining way.
